title: carex lasiocarpa var. lasiocarpa
intro: Carex lasiocarpa var. lasiocarpa, also known as woolly sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae and is native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Carex lasiocarpa var. lasiocarpa include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Carex lasiocarpa var. lasiocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
